doctor.description: Run structured dependency + environment diagnostics (config, auth, env-var shadowing, API key scope, network reachability, ffmpeg, disk writeability, default_output_dir). JSON mode returns {checks, summary}. Exits 0 on pass/warn-only, 2 on any fail.
options: --skip <name> (repeatable: config_file | api_key | env_shadow | api_key_scope | network | ffmpeg | disk_write | output_dir)
